channel.title: Back to Top on Frank Wang's Coding World
channel.description: Recent content in Back to Top on Frank Wang's Coding World

item.title: Back To Top
item.description: Today’s web pages contain a lot of content, and it is basically impossible to display them all on one screen. At this time, the user needs to move the scroll bar (slide the mouse wheel) to view the entire content. If he wants to return to the top, he also needs to move the scroll bar. If the page is too long, the experience is obviously not good enough. Therefore, the Back to Top button came into being.
